definition: indication of the required package type used

definition_ml.en: indication of the required package type used
definition_ml.de: Angabe des benötigten Verpackungstyp, der benutzt wird

source_document: UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods, 18th Ed. 2013, Part 3
note:
For package types of dangerous goods see UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods, 18th Ed. 2013, Part 3 and Part 4

For non hazardous goods see ISO/IEC Guide 41:2003, Packaging -- Recommendations for addressing consumer needs

note_ml.en:
For package types of dangerous goods see UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods, 18th Ed. 2013, Part 3 and Part 4

For non hazardous goods see ISO/IEC Guide 41:2003, Packaging -- Recommendations for addressing consumer needs
note_ml.de:
1. Zu Verpackungstypen von gefährlichen Gütern, siehe UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods, 18th Ed. 2013, Part 3 and Part 4. 
2. Für ungefährliche Güter, siehe ISO/IEC Guide 41:2003, Packaging -- Recommendations for addressing consumer needs.
